title: Edge Case - Verify app state when backgrounded on OTP screen
description: Tests that the OTP screen state and timer are handled correctly when the app is backgrounded.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. On the OTP screen, note the current value of the resend timer.
2. Press the home button to send the app to the background.
4. Re-open the STAGE app from the recent apps list.
5. Observe the OTP screen and the resend timer.

expected_result: The app returns to the OTP screen. The timer should have continued counting down or paused and resumed correctly, reflecting the elapsed time.
